patches.hypothesis: The original patch does not correctly handle sequences longer than the remaining input and lacks proper null checks. The refined fix will add these checks and ensure the loop boundaries are correctly managed to avoid overfitting.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by not properly checking the bounds of the array when comparing characters in the sequence. This leads to an ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when the end of the input array is reached without finding the sequence.

patches.hypothesis: The original code does not handle surrogate pairs and lacks comprehensive edge case handling. The refined patch will address these issues by incorporating surrogate pair detection and adding checks for null, empty sequences, and sequences longer than the input.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by not properly checking the bounds of the array when comparing characters in the sequence. The loop can go out of bounds when trying to access elements beyond the end of the input array.
